subject: [PATCH v4 10/14] mm/pagemap: add PAGE_IS_ACCESSED for RWP tracking

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch adds a new category to the pagemap, called PAGE_IS_ACCESSED, which is used for read-write protection (RWP) tracking. It introduces a new bit in the PTE that indicates whether a page has been accessed, and scopes it to the VMA whose registered mode makes the bit meaningful. This allows for more precise tracking of RWP-protected pages and avoids conflation with write-protected pages. The patch also updates various files to reflect this change, including documentation and user API headers.
